title: University of Bath Pure API Person
description: An academic professional, student, or other individual attached to the institution.

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object, prefer using the UUID if it is present on the entity

uuid.description: UUID, this is the primary identity of the entity

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification

portalUrl.description: URL of the content on the Pure Portal

previousUuids.description: UUIDs of other content items which have been merged into this content item (or similar)

items.description: UUIDs of other content items which have been merged into this content item (or similar)

version.description: Used to guard against conflicting updates. For new content this is null, and for existing content the current value. The property should never be modified by a client, except in the rare case where the client wants to perform an update irrespective of if other clients have made updates in the meantime, also known as a "dirty write". A dirty write is performed by not including the property value or setting the property to null

startDateAsResearcher.description: Date that the person entered into the academic profession.

affiliationNote.description: Notes regarding affiliations of the person.

employeeStartDate.description: Date of the persons first day of the institution.

employeeEndDate.description: Date of the persons last day of the institution.

externalPositions.description: positions held by the person, that are external to the institution

keywordGroups.description: Groups of Keyword associated with the person.

leavesOfAbsence.description: Leaves of absence had by the person.

names.description: Variant names of the person, Known aliases, ect.

orcidAuthenticated.description: Authentication status of the orcid associated with the person.

cienciaIdAuthenticated.description: Authentication status of the Ciencia ID associated with the person.

honoraryStaffOrganizationAssociations.description: Organizations that the person is associated with under the title of 'Honorary Staff'

staffOrganizationAssociations.description: Organizations that the person is associated with as 'Staff'

studentOrganizationAssociations.description: Organizations that the person is associated with as a 'Student'

visitingScholarOrganizationAssociations.description: Organizations that the person is associated with as a 'Visiting Scholar

academicQualifications.description: Levels of academic qualifications that the person has achieved.

profilePhotos.description: Profile photos in the form of Image files. The maximum file size is 1mb

professionalQualifications.description: The professional qualifications held by the person

selectedForProfileRefinementService.description: If the person has been profiled.

profileInformation.description: Information objects making up profiles made of the person

retirementDate.description: Date of retirement for the person

willingToTakePhdStudents.description: Boolean to define if the Person is willing to take on Phd Students.

willingToTakePhdStudentsDescription.description: Field to describe or list phd projects that the person will participate in.

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object, prefer using the UUID if it is present on the entity

awardDate.description: Date that the education was awarded at.

AcademicQualification.description: An object mapping the data of an education received by a person

road.description: Name of road and house number, eg. 'Pennsylvania Avenue' or '123 Main St.'

room.description: Room number or name if available, eg. '1.23' or 'Office of Creative Services'

building.description: Building Name if available, eg. 'Couper Administration Building'

additionalProperties.description: A set of localized strings that support formatting. Invalid locale values will be ignored.

FreeKeywordsKeywordGroup.description: De-normalized version of the full keyword group representation for instances where only free keywords can be selected

FullKeywordGroup.description: Keywords of a specific type. A type of keyword can be configured to solely support free keywords (represented as the FreeKeywordsKeywordGroup type), to solely support structured keywords (represented as the ClassificationsKeywordGroup type), or to both support structured keywords supplemented by optional free keywords (this type)

calculatedPoint.description: Used to determine whether or not we may update the point. An end-user has not entered a point manually if the value of the calculated point is the same as point

programme.description: The name or title of a program often consists of the degree (e.g., BS) and the discipline or field of study (e.g., Business Administration).
